changeSet.author: danylo
changeSet.sql: CREATE OR ALTER TRIGGER trg_update_event_task_counters ON project_tasks AFTER INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE AS BEGIN SET NOCOUNT ON; DECLARE @affectedEvents TABLE (event_id UNIQUEIDENTIFIER); INSERT INTO @affectedEvents(event_id) SELECT DISTINCT event_id FROM inserted WHERE event_id IS NOT NULL; INSERT INTO @affectedEvents(event_id) SELECT DISTINCT event_id FROM deleted WHERE event_id IS NOT NULL; UPDATE e SET tasks_total_count = stats.total_count, tasks_completed_count = stats.completed_count FROM events e JOIN ( SELECT event_id, COUNT(*) AS total_count, SUM( CASE WHEN status = 'Completed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) AS completed_count FROM project_tasks WHERE event_id IN ( SELECT DISTINCT event_id FROM @affectedEvents ) GROUP BY event_id ) stats ON e.id = stats.event_id; UPDATE events SET tasks_total_count = 0, tasks_completed_count = 0 WHERE id IN ( SELECT event_id FROM @affectedEvents ) AND id NOT IN ( SELECT DISTINCT event_id FROM project_tasks WHERE event_id IS NOT NULL ); END;
